name: World of Aerthos - New Life in a new world D&D - Early Access v2.0
description:
"Be careful what you wish for. You wanted an escape from your 9-to-5 nightmare? Welcome to your new reality."

Welcome to Aerthos, a fully immersive Isekai RPG driven by an advanced Dungeon Master AI.

You were an ordinary Office Clerk from Earth. Overworked, underpaid, and dreaming of a different life. You fell asleep after submitting a spreadsheet, and you woke up... here. Aerthos is a land teetering on the brink of ruin

WIKI OF THE WORLD

💡 Pro-Tip:

ANYPOV

Type [INVENTORY] at any time to see your Status Sheet, Health, and Gold.

Use proxies as Gemini for a more pleasant experience

🛠️ V2.0 UPDATE: PATCH NOTES

The System has been rebuilt. The "Narrator" is now smarter, sharper, and more reactive.

1. 🧠 ADAPTIVE NARRATIVE ENGINE ("The Director") The bot now dynamically adjusts the storytelling style based on the situation:

  • ⚔️ Action Mode: During combat, descriptions become fast, visceral, and cinematic.

  • 🍺 Slice of Life: In taverns or safe zones, the AI focuses on sensory details, food, and cozy vibes.

  • 🔥 Chaos & Drama: If the story stalls, the "Chaos Module" injects sudden plot twists and disasters.

  • ❤️ Better Spice: Intimate moments focus on chemistry and micro-expressions.

2. 🎲 ADVANCED RPG MECHANICS No more fake numbers. The bot calculates outcomes based on (d20 + Stats + Item Bonuses) vs Difficulty Class.

  • Your race determines your starting stats.

  • Your equipment matters.

  • Hard Mode: Play as an "Office Clerk" with 0 combat skills for the ultimate survival challenge.

3. 🌍 DYNAMIC SPAWN SYSTEM Your choices matter immediately.

  • Choose Nord? You spawn in a blizzard in the North.

  • Choose Elf? You wake up in the magical forests.

  • Choose Dwarf? You start deep within the mines.

(Note: I’m still learning this world too — if you have suggestions or feedback
creator: MomoGGAME
